stories.title: Expect surprises, not just PSG attack vs. Arsenal ...
stories.summary: Both managers have plenty of tricks up their sleeve to change the game entirely.

stories.title: Champions League finals often disappoint, but PSG ...
stories.summary: When was the last time both teams scored in a Champions League final? Will PSG vs. Arsenal be any different?

stories.title: Slot exits Liverpool one year after EPL triumph
stories.summary: Liverpool have confirmed head coach Arne Slot will leave the club with immediate effect.

stories.title: Grieving Andersen steps up in goal for Hurricanes
stories.summary: Hurricanes goaltender Frederik Andersen played with a heavy heart in Friday's Game 5 victory over the Canadiens after his agent, Claude Lemieux, died by suicide Thursday.

stories.title: Sorsby bet on IU at least 40 times as Hoosiers QB
stories.summary: Brendan Sorsby placed at least 40 bets involving Indiana football as a Hoosiers quarterback and used sportsbook accounts registered to a family member and friends to wager approximately $90,000 over four years, according to court documents.
